acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

burn(address,address,uint256).details: V2 enhancement allowing third-party burning with proper authorization

params.debtTokenAmt: The amount of debt tokens (FT/XT pairs) to burn
params.owner: The address that owns the tokens to be burned
params.recipient: The address that will receive the redeemed underlying tokens

params.debtTokenAmt: Amount of underlying token want to get

createOrder((address,address,address,add.details: Uses CREATE to deploy the order contract at a non-deterministic address
Uses CREATE2 to deploy the order contract at a deterministic address based on the salt

params.debt: The amount of debt, unit by underlying token
The amount of debt, unit by underlying token

leverageByXt(address,address,uint128,byt.details: V2 enhancement allowing leverage creation on behalf of another address

params.callbackData: Encoded data passed to the flash loan callback for collateral handling
params.recipient: The address that will receive the generated GT (Gearing Token)
params.xtAmt: The amount of XT tokens to use for creating the leveraged position
params.xtOwner: The address that owns the XT tokens to be used for leverage

returns.gtId: The ID of the newly minted Gearing Token representing the leveraged position

params.callbackData: The data of flash loan callback
params.xtAmt: The amount of XT token.              The caller will receive an equal amount of underlying token by flash loan.

params.debtTokenAmt: Amount of underlying token want to lock

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

predictOrderAddress((address,address,add.details: Computes the address using CREATE2 without actually deploying the contract

params.ftAmount: The amount of FT want to redeem

redeem(address,address,uint256).details: V2 enhancement allowing third-party redemption with proper authorization

params.ftAmount: The amount of FT tokens to redeem
params.ftOwner: The address that owns the FT tokens to be redeemed
params.recipient: The address that will receive the redeemed assets

returns._0: debtTokenAmt The amount of underlying debt tokens received
returns._1: deliveryData Encoded data containing collateral delivery information

params.ftAmount: The amount of FT want to redeem
params.recipient: Who will receive the underlying tokens

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

returns._0: Fixed-rate Token(bond token). Earning Fixed Income with High Certainty
returns._1: Intermediary Token for Collateralization and Leveragin

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

burn(address,address,uint256).notice: Burns FT and XT tokens on behalf of an owner to redeem underlying tokens

burn(address,uint256).notice: Burn FT and XT to get underlying token.         No price slippage or handling fees.

createOrder((address,address,address,add.notice: Creates a new TermMax order with default parameters
Creates a new TermMax order with a unique salt for address uniqueness

initialize((address,address,address,addr.notice: Initialize the token and configuration of the market

issueFt(address,uint128,bytes).notice: Using collateral to issue FT tokens.         Caller will get FT(bond) tokens equal to the debt amount subtract issue fee

issueFtByExistedGt(address,uint128,uint2.notice: Using collateral to issue FT tokens.         Caller will get FT(bond) tokens equal to the debt amount subtract issue fee

leverageByXt(address,address,uint128,byt.notice: Creates a leveraged position using XT tokens from a specified owner

leverageByXt(address,uint128,bytes).notice: Flash loan underlying token for leverage

mint(address,uint256).notice: Mint FT and XT tokens by underlying token.         No price slippage or handling fees.

name().notice: Returns the human-readable name of the market

predictOrderAddress((address,address,add.notice: Predict the address of a TermMax order that would be created with given parameters and salt

previewRedeem(uint256).notice: Preview the redeem amount and delivery data

redeem(address,address,uint256).notice: Redeems FT tokens on behalf of an owner after market maturity

tokens().notice: Return the tokens in TermMax Market

updateGtConfig(bytes).notice: Set the configuration of Gearing Token

updateOrderFeeRate(address,(uint32,uint3.notice: Set the fee rate of order
